channel.title: Swift on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Swift on Arrans github.io

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: scriptingosx/DownloadFullInstaller
item.description: macOS application written in SwiftUI that downloads installer pkgs for the Install macOS Big Sur application.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)
